misc.text: So earth copied Itachi‘s Mangekyou Sharingan design??? Naruto ended 10 years ago but it’s still the most influential Anime of all time😭🙏🏼 #NARUTO The Astronomy Guy (@astrooalert) NASA just released a breathtaking view of Antarctica Community note: This image is not from NASA.
